response.justification: Although Bogdan possesses over 20 years of software engineering experience with strong architectural and leadership skills, he critically lacks the minimum requirement of 8 years of C++ programming. His background is predominantly in TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, and his recent roles lean toward full-stack and web applications rather than the low-level cloud compute and hardware architecture required for this technical lead position.
strengths: Extensive 20+ year background in software design, architecture, and launching scalable software products.
Proven technical leadership and mentoring capabilities, including organizing workshops, Dojos, and establishing TDD/CI/CD practices.
Solid experience with distributed systems and microservices handling high traffic.
concerns: Fails to meet the minimum qualification of 8 years of C++ experience, with only 6 months of professional C++ listed in 2007-2008.
Experience is heavily focused on web, full-stack, and AI-agent tooling rather than foundational cloud compute technologies or hardware architecture.
Lacks explicit large-scale infrastructure leadership specifically within core compute platform domains.
